layout.dev_banner_default: This website is still in development. Some features may not work as expected.
home.hero_title: The student partner for infrastructure and security services.
home.hero_description: At Tandem IT, students work on challenging projects in network infrastructure and cybersecurity. We support schools and organizations without the expertise or budget for professional services.
about.section_mission_content: At Tandem IT, we believe in the power of collaboration and innovation. Our mission is to support organizations with flexible, scalable, and secure IT solutions so they can focus entirely on growth and development.
about.section_approach_content: We combine technical expertise with a personal approach. By working closely with our clients, we develop tailored solutions that fit the specific challenges of each organization.
about.section_goals_content: Our goal is to be a reliable partner in digital transformation. We strive to optimize business processes, improve security, and stimulate innovation within organizations.
about.section_vision_content: We see a future where technology is not just a supporting role, but the driving force behind growth and social progress. At Tandem IT, we work on a sustainable digital world in which everyone benefits from technological innovation.
about.section_history_content: Tandem IT originated from a passion for technology and the ambition to create real change. Since our founding, we have worked with various organizations, applying our knowledge and experience to solve complex IT challenges.
about.section_team_content: Our team consists of enthusiastic students with a passion for IT. Together, we work on challenging projects and innovative solutions. By combining our strengths, we can achieve maximum results for our clients.
contact.agree_text: I have read and agree to the privacy policy.

contact.error_last_name: Enter at least 2 characters for your last name.
contact.error_message: Enter at least 10 characters in your message.
contact.error_agree: You must agree to the terms.
contact.success: Thanks for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error_submit: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Meet the people behind Tandem IT: enthusiastic students with a passion for technology and innovation.
home.enthousiast_title: A close-knit team of enthusiastic HBO-ICT students
home.enthousiast_intro: At Tandem IT, we combine theoretical knowledge with practical experience. As a student company of Utrecht University of Applied Sciences, we work on real-world projects under the guidance of experienced professionals.
home.enthousiast_feature_student_desc: A young and dynamic team of HBO-ICT students with fresh ideas and modern technical knowledge.
home.enthousiast_feature_technical_desc: Expertise in modern frameworks like React, Svelte, and Node.js, plus networking and cloud solutions.
home.enthousiast_feature_innovative_desc: Focus on cutting-edge technologies and modern development methods for future-proof solutions.
home.enthousiast_feature_open_source_des: Active contribution to open source projects and use of software development best practices.
home.enthousiast_mission: Our mission is to provide high-quality IT solutions that make a difference for our clients, while giving students the opportunity to gain practical experience in a professional environment.
home.enthousiast_go_about_aria: Go to the About us page
home.goals_goal_desc: We set clear, practical goals that help us deliver measurable impact for every client.
home.aanpak_title: An effective organization, powered by our Scrum approach.
home.aanpak_intro: At Tandem IT, we believe in the power of agile development. With our scrum approach, we can respond flexibly to changing needs and consistently deliver high-quality results aligned with your goals.
home.aanpak_process_1_desc: We start with a thorough analysis of your issue. By listening carefully and asking the right questions, we get a clear picture of your needs and objectives.
home.aanpak_process_2_desc: Based on our analysis, we develop a plan of action. We use modern technologies and methods to arrive at the best solution.
home.aanpak_process_3_desc: With our scrum team, we work iteratively on implementation. Through short sprints and regular feedback, we ensure a result that perfectly matches your wishes.
home.aanpak_secondary_desc: Our approach is based on years of experience in software development and project management. We combine the flexibility of scrum with the stability of proven development methods. This enables us to translate complex challenges into effective solutions that add immediate value to your organization.

footer.description: Tandem IT is a fictional IT company focused on building future-proof software solutions. Together with students from Utrecht University of Applied Sciences, we work on challenging projects for real clients.
